draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"BASIC VEGETABLE STOCK","yield_phrase":"2 QUARTS"},"steps":[{"instruction":"1. Pour 4 cups of water into a medium bowl and sprinkle with the gelatin. Set aside until the gelatin is hydrated, about 10 minutes.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 ounce (4 packets; about 3 tablespoons) unflavored gelatin"}]},{"instruction":"2. Meanwhile, put the onions, carrots, celery, leek, mushrooms, apples, bay leaves, peppercorns, fennel, coriander, and parsley in a large Dutch oven or stockpot and add cold water to just cover the ingredients. Add the hydrated gelatin and water and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Adjust the heat to maintain a slow, steady simmer and cook for 1 hour, adding hot water as necessary to keep the ingredients submerged.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 large onions, roughly chopped"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 large carrots, peeled and roughly chopped"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"4 stalks celery, roughly chopped"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 large leek, trimmed"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"8 ounces mushroom stems and scraps and/or whole mushrooms"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 Granny Smith apples, quartered"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 bay leaves"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 teaspoons whole black peppercorns"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 teaspoon fennel seeds"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 teaspoon coriander seeds"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"6 sprigs fresh parsley"}]}]}
